title: cornella suecica
intro: Cornella suecica, also known as Cornelian cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the dogwood family. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and ascorbic acid. The health benefits of Cornella suecica include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and have antioxidant properties, which help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Cornella suecica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
